---
title: "Now"
subtitle: "What I'm up to"
title-block-banner: false
---

<!--This is my personal clarity, please delete or replace with your clarity-->

<!-- {{< include /files/includes/_msclarity.qmd >}} -->

A few things keep me busy these days:

## Cycling

-   When I'm not working, I'm usually out on my bike, or on Zwift during the winter and rainy days

## Research

::: callout-tip
## Big picture question

How can we achieve develop and evaluate clinical prediction models / predictive AI tools that are more:

-   trustworthy
-   accurate
-   fair
-   fit for purpose
:::

### I welcome collaborations on

-   prediction model/predictive AI research

    -   study design
    -   model evaluation
    -   fairness
    -   implementation
    -   reducing research waste
    -   transparency
    -   risk of bias

-   reporting guidelines

-   initiatives to monitor adherence reporting guidelines

-   meta-science

-   open science practices
